title: Public Relations & Investor Relations Senior Executive
description:
Primech Holdings is seeking a strategic, resourceful, and forward-thinking Senior Executive, Public Relations, Communications & Investor Relations to strengthen the company’s reputation, credibility, and visibility among key stakeholders.

This role plays a critical part in shaping Primech’s corporate narrative, driving media engagement, supporting investor communications, and producing high-impact strategic materials. The ideal candidate is an exceptional storyteller with strong public relations foundations, excellent writing skills, and the ability to support cross-functional leadership on high-priority communication and investor-related projects.

Key Responsibilities:

1. Public Relations & Media Engagement

  • Develop and execute public relations strategies that align with business objectives, product milestones, and corporate initiatives.

  • Build and maintain strong relationships with journalists, media outlets, and industry partners.

  • Draft and distribute press releases, statements, feature articles, and other corporate communication materials.

  • Coordinate and manage media interviews, press conferences, and publicity opportunities.

  • Track, analyse, and report media coverage; provide insights and recommendations to leadership.

2. Corporate & Executive Communications

  • Create speeches, talking points, media advisories, and key communication materials for senior management.

  • Lead media pitching, media engagement efforts, and executive interview preparations.

  • Monitor industry developments, public sentiment, and relevant regulatory updates to ensure timely and strategic communication responses.

3. Social Media & Content Development

  • Oversee the strategy and content direction for corporate social media platforms (Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, LinkedIn).

  • Manage editorial calendars, campaigns, and storytelling initiatives aligned with brand objectives.

  • Produce compelling and on-brand content that strengthens engagement and supports public relations and IR campaigns.

4. Campaigns, Events & Public Relations Initiatives

  • Plan and execute integrated campaigns, public relations activations, and partnership initiatives.

  • Oversee branding, messaging, and creative assets for events, exhibitions, investor engagements, and key presentations.

  • Manage event-related media interactions, including press briefings, interviews, and promotional activities.

  • Work closely with internal teams and external vendors to deliver high-impact outcomes.

5. Investor Relations (IR) & Strategic Materials Support

  • Assist Senior Management in developing and refining investor-facing materials, including investor presentations, quarterly updates, corporate decks, fact sheets, and strategic communication assets.

  • Conduct market, competitor, and industry research to support investor insights and positioning.

  • Contribute to investor-related marketing materials and storytelling, ensuring clarity, accuracy, and alignment with corporate messaging.

  • Support the development of pitch decks, fundraising materials, and strategic proposals for leadership, especially for high-priority assignments from our CEO.

  • Ensure consistency and cohesion between public and invesotr relations narratives to strengthen the company’s strategic communication framework.

6. Cross-Functional & Ad-Hoc Strategic Support

  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams on corporate initiatives requiring communications or IR expertise.

  • Provide flexible, on-demand support for strategic projects and presentation materials as requested by our CEO.

  • Prepare slides, conduct research, draft content, and support strategic communication planning for internal and external stakeholders.

7. Research, Insights & Reporting

  • Conduct market and competitor research to identify trends, risks, and communication opportunities.

  • Monitor media coverage, investor sentiment, and broader industry conversations related to the company and its stakeholders.

  • Track and report on the effectiveness of public relations, communications, and IR activities to guide continuous improvement.

Minimum Requirements:

  • Degree in Marketing, Communications, Public Relations, or a related field.

  • Minimum 2 years of relevant experience in public relations, communications, or marketing, ideally in a fast-paced or corporate environment.

  • Strong skills in corporate storytelling, brand messaging, and strategic communication.

  • Proven ability to develop content across multiple formats (press releases, speeches, social media, executive decks, corporate publications).

  • Excellent project management skills with strong attention to detail and the ability to manage multiple priorities effectively.

  • Proficiency with presentation and design tools (e.g., PowerPoint, Canva).

  • Collaborative, resourceful, and adaptable, with the ability to support cross-functional stakeholders and ad-hoc projects.

postedCompany.description: Headquartered in Singapore, Primech Holdings Limited is a leading provider of comprehensive technology-driven facilities services, predominantly serving both public and private sectors throughout Singapore. Primech Holdings offers an extensive range of services tailored to meet the complex demands of its diverse clientele. Services include advanced general facility maintenance services, specialized cleaning solutions such as marble polishing and facade cleaning, meticulous stewarding services, and targeted cleaning services for offices and homes. Known for its commitment to sustainability and cutting-edge technology, Primech Holdings integrates eco-friendly practices and smart technology solutions to enhance operational efficiency and client satisfaction. This strategic approach positions Primech Holdings as a leader in the industry and a proactive contributor to advancing industry standards and practices in Singapore and beyond.
postedCompany.name: PRIMECH HOLDINGS LTD.
